| definition:bk5_process_free_energy | conditional | Book5Residue.MetabolicBudget.complexity_le, Book5Residue.MetabolicBudget.complexity_le | F_proc's admissibility role is mirrored by the MetabolicBudget structure's cost law; the E_cost/E_eff/C_hint decomposition itself is not modeled. |

| proposition:bk5_operator_evolution | conditional | Book5Op.operator_stationary_iff_critical | Stationary iff critical point of F_proc for the descent step; the minimizer/critical gap stays open. |
| theorem:bk5_operator_convergence | conditional | Book5Op.contraction_flow_converges | SRMF convergence to a fixed point (contraction-Banach); the Wasserstein O(1/t) rate stays open. |
| lemma:bk5_recursive_flow_convergence | conditional | Book5Op.contraction_flow_unique_fixed_point | The recursive reflective flow converges to a unique stable fixed point. |
| proposition:bk5_operators_evolve | conditional | Book5Op.contraction_flow_unique_fixed_point | Operators evolve to and rest at the unique viable fixed point. |
| proposition:bk5_metabolic_capacity_non_decreasing | proved-kernel | Book5Op.metabolic_capacity_monotone | Metabolic capacity non-decreasing in energy reserves. |
| corollary:bk5_spectral_radius_optimality | proved-kernel | Book5Op.viability_antitone_in_spectral_radius | Viability antitone in spectral radius: minimizing rho maximizes viability. |
| proposition:bk5_symbolic_population_ess_map_equivalence_case2 | conditional | Book5ESSEquivalence.distance_tendsto_zero_of_eventually_identified | Finite discrete strategy-set kernel: eventual two-sided ESS-to-MAP identification yields distance convergence to zero; population concentration alone does not imply equality of the abstract sets. |
| axiom:bk5_srmf_operator_selection_evolution | conditional | Book5OperatorSelection.exists_process_minimizer, Book5OperatorSelection.selected_le_incumbent, Book5OperatorSelection.rejects_strictly_suboptimal_incumbent, Book5OperatorSelection.viability_alone_does_not_force_operator_argmin | Finite optimization kernel: a nonempty operator inventory has a process-free-energy minimizer, whose certificate dominates every incumbent and rejects strictly suboptimal choices. Viability alone does not imply that selection law; SRMF dynamics remain an explicit bridge. |
| theorem:bk5__srmf_operator_adaptation | conditional | Book5OperatorAdaptation.refinementVelocity_eq_of_below, Book5OperatorAdaptation.refinementVelocity_pos, Book5OperatorAdaptation.gradientStep_displacement, Book5OperatorAdaptation.quadratic_processFreeEnergy_descent, Book5OperatorAdaptation.process_descent_can_increase_execution_cost, Book5OperatorAdaptation.below_threshold_alone_does_not_force_adaptation | Explicit adaptation-law kernel: below-threshold effectiveness creates deficit-proportional refinement pressure under a positive feedback gain; a stable gradient step descends quadratic process free energy; and execution cost may rise while total process energy falls. The threshold inequality alone does not force an update. |
| theorem:bk5_metabolic_constraints_reflective_accuracy | conditional | Book5ReflectiveAccuracy.fidelity_le_log_of_depth_bound, Book5ReflectiveAccuracy.fidelityEnvelope_nonneg, Book5ReflectiveAccuracy.capacity_alone_does_not_bound_unconstrained_fidelity | Composition kernel: bounded marginal fidelity per reflective level plus a logarithmic metabolic recursion-depth bound yields the printed logarithmic accuracy envelope. Metabolic capacity alone cannot constrain an otherwise unrestricted fidelity value. |
| proposition:bk5_shade_transfers | conditional | Book5ShadeTransfer.shade_preserved_of_radius_preserved, Book5ShadeTransfer.radial_order_alone_does_not_preserve_shade, Book5ShadeTransfer.golden_logRadius_step, Book5ShadeTransfer.normalized_shade_is_not_multiplicative, Book5ShadeTransfer.balanced_reciprocity_paints_golden_rate, Book5ShadeTransfer.extraction_has_unit_radial_rate | Exact radius preservation transports shade, but radial-order preservation alone does not. Golden spiral steps add log(phi) to log-radius; bounded normalized shade is not multiplicative. Balanced reciprocity has rate phi, while zero reciprocal weight has unit radial rate. |

## Open claim surface

These theorem-like Book 5 nodes are not mapped to a Lean declaration yet. Their paper proofs may be useful, but this package does not call them Lean-verified.
